steps.title: Identify the student's goal and the key note
steps.content: The student wants to specify why the Mayflower Compact was created. The notes state directly: "It was created in 1620 to establish a common government." That is the purpose — the answer must use this stated reason, not other details from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Stating that its signatories wanted to "plant the first colony in the northern parts of Virginia," the Mayflower Compact was a legal agreement among the pilgrims that immigrated to Plymouth Colony.': Describes what the signatories wanted and what the document was, but does not specify why it was created. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Created in 1620, the Mayflower Compact states that the pilgrims wanted to "plant the first colony in the northern parts of Virginia."': Gives the date and a quoted goal of the pilgrims, but never states the purpose for which the Compact was created. ✗
  • Choice C — 'The Mayflower Compact was created to establish a common government among the pilgrims that immigrated to Plymouth Colony.': Directly states the reason the Compact was created, matching the key note exactly. ✓
  • Choice D — 'The Mayflower Compact had 41 signatories, including John Carver, the first governor of Plymouth Colony.': Provides biographical and numerical details with no mention of why the Compact was created. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
